sensitivity: 0.73 [0.639 95% CI lower bound] for AF/NSR overall; 0.989 [0.928 95% CI lower bound] for AF/NSR only (excluding inconclusive and noise)
specificity: 0.955 [0.914 95% CI lower bound] for AF/NSR overall; 0.994 [0.968 95% CI lower bound] for AF/NSR only (excluding inconclusive and noise)
intended_use: The Withings Scan Monitor 2.0 is intended to record, store and transfer lead II and lead-III of a two-channel electrocardiogram (ECG). In addition, it calculates and displays leads I, aVR, aVF, aVL. T
intended_use_full: The Withings Scan Monitor 2.0 is intended to record, store and transfer lead II and lead-III of a two-channel electrocardiogram (ECG). In addition, it calculates and displays leads I, aVR, aVF, aVL. The Withings Scan Monitor 2.0 also displays ECG rhythms and detects the presence of atrial fibrillation (when the monitor is prescribed or used under care of a physician). The Withings Scan Monitor 2.0 is intended for use by healthcare professionals, patients with known or suspected heart conditions and health-conscious individuals. The Withings Scan Monitor 2.0 is intended for adult patients in hospitals, clinics, long-term care facilities, and homes.
ground_truth: 12-lead reference ECG signals reviewed by cardiologists
other_metrics: Polarity accuracy: 0.986 (P-waves), 0.948 (QRS complex), 0.911 (T-waves); PR interval standard deviation of difference < 20 ms; QRS width standard deviation of difference < 20 ms; QT interval standard deviation of difference 30.3 ms; Mean heart rate difference -0.96 bpm with 3.81 bpm standard deviation; 7.7% of valid ECG records classified as noise
